alertMessage: [异常高频抽奖]${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.bankName}: ${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.campaignName}(${KafkaEventDTO.eventAttrMap.campaignId})中游戏用户(${KafkaEventDTO.targetValue})最近${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.windowValue}${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.windowUnit}内抽奖数量为${ProcessorDTO.eventFieldAndValueSumMap.lottery}，超过${RuleInfoDTO.ruleCondGroup.0.threshold}次，请您及时查看原因！
